briefdescription.para: Default clock for throttled log messages.
Whether to send drive messages to the vehicle.
Time delay penalty for the path planner.
Name of the speed function to use for raceline.
Speed adjustment factors for path sectors.
Lateral step size for road width sampling (m).
Field of view for lidar scan (degrees).
Factor for reducing speed when no path is found.
Whether the raceline path has been obtained.
Whether the current speed has been obtained.
Whether the current pose has been obtained.
Whether the lidar scan has been obtained.
Whether the pure pursuit algorithm is enabled.
Cubic spline representing the reference path.
Current odometry pose of the vehicle.
Constructor for the FrenetOvertakingNode. Initializes parameters, subscriptions, and publishers.
Callback to handle status updates for enabling/disabling pure pursuit.

parameterdescription.para: Message indicating whether pure pursuit is enabled.
Odometry message containing the current speed and pose.
Odometry message containing the current pose of the vehicle.
LaserScan message containing the lidar scan data.

briefdescription.para: Callback to handle updates to the raceline path.

parameterdescription.para: RacelineStamped message containing the raceline path.

briefdescription.para: Visualizes the look-ahead and nearest points using markers.

parameterdescription.para: Common header for the visualization messages.
x coordinate of look ahead point
y coordinate of look ahead point

briefdescription.para: Visualizes the best path using markers.

parameterdescription.para: Common header for the visualization messages.

briefdescription.para: Main control loop for the Pure Pursuit algorithm. Calculates target steering and speed, and sends control commands.
ROS2 node that implements the Pure Pursuit algorithm for controlling a vehicle along a raceline.
